title: Bob Lee
compiled_truth: Bob Lee is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-07 to 2002-01-15), Bob Lee sent 19 and received 160 emails, totalling 179 interactions. Top correspondents: [Zimin Lu](people/zimin-lu) (14), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (13), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (11), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (3), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (3). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, market.
